content.full_text:
October 23, 2002

Gerald M. Bonetto, Ph.D.
Printing Industries of California
5800 South Eastern Avenue
Post Office Box 910936
Los Angeles, CA 90091-0936

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-252

Dear Dr. Bonetto:

Pursuant to our telephone conversation earlier today, we are treating your recent request for advice on behalf of the Printing Industries of California regarding the provisions of the Political Reform Act as withdrawn.

If you have any other questions regarding this or any other matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: C. Scott Tocher
Counsel, Legal Division
